ddls:
CREATE TABLE "robots" (
  "robot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each robot */,
  "robot_name" TEXT /* Name of the robot */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the robot */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the robot */,
  "deployment_location" TEXT /* Location where the robot is deployed */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date the robot was deployed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed on the robot */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the robot record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the robot record was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the robot (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("robot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "robot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the robot from which the data was collected */,
  "date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data entry */,
  "command_vel" REAL /* Commanded velocity (m/s) */,
  "actual_vel" REAL /* Actual velocity (m/s) */,
  "angular_vel" REAL /* Angular velocity (rad/s) */,
  "right_current" REAL /* Current drawn by the right motor (A) */,
  "left_current" REAL /* Current drawn by the left motor (A) */,
  "bumper_status" INTEGER /* Status of the bumper (0 = not pressed, 1 = pressed) */,
  "wheeldrop_status" INTEGER /* Status of the wheeldrop (0 = not dropped, 1 = dropped) */,
  "label" INTEGER /* Label for the data entry (e.g., 5 = normal operation) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the data entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_robot_id FOREIGN KEY ("robot_id") REFERENCES robots ("robot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environment */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the environment */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the environment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the environment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the environment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "robot_environments" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "robot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the robot */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the deployment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the deployment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_robot_environments_robot_id FOREIGN KEY ("robot_id") REFERENCES robots ("robot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_robot_environments_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES environments ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log */,
  "robot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the robot */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, repair) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who performed the maintenance */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the maintenance log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the maintenance log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_robot_id FOREIGN KEY ("robot_id") REFERENCES robots ("robot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the data entry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the label */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the label */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the label was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the label was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_labels_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry */,
  "label_id" INTEGER /* ID of the label */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_labels_mapping_label_id FOREIGN KEY ("label_id") REFERENCES data_labels ("label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_labels_mapping_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)
